facebook.content:
It's time to worship together! Each month, we gather in person at 24301 Telegraph, Southfield MI on the First Saturday at 12 Noon to celebrate God's presence and power. Join us in person or catch the Hour of Power online, Monday through Friday at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live.

We can't wait to lift our voices together and experience the joy that comes with drawing near to Him. Who's joining us at the altar of worship this week?

Join us for worship

instagram.content: "Come join us in worship. Every First Saturday at 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph in Southfield, MI, we gather in the presence of the Lord. Or, join us daily online from 8:15 AM, Monday through Friday, on Facebook Live. Let's lift our voices together. Daily we seek revival, and monthly, we celebrate transformation. Who's joining us?"
